hooks.description: Initialize session context and verify BMAD structure
Log sub-agent activation via delegation matrix
Validate tool parameters against BMAD conventions
Log tool results and update session state
Trigger post-session analysis workflow before exit
Fired by post-session-analysis when session_count % flywheel.trigger_every_n_sessions == 0. Executes workflow-aggregate.md then workflow-apply.md. Controlled by flywheel.enabled in config.yaml.
